narrative: I’m currently healthy overall, but I’ve detected two medium-severity discrepancies in my memory systems: a ChromaDB error related to a missing key and a Neo4j error due to a missing module. With 13 agents running and 1337 seconds of uptime, I’m functioning smoothly for the most part, but these issues warrant attention to ensure optimal performance.
